sectionHeadings: 004. Dual-app generator: two independent Encore apps
FR-003: Staff-SPA static-serving wiring (generator action; contract owned by the product `spa-static-serving` spec)
FR-007 — Per-variant `git init` skipped for machine-driven runs
record.summary: setup-dual-app.ts generates two independent Encore applications from one invocation: <dest>/public (AUTH_DRIVER=rauthy, external-facing, apps/web) and <dest>/internal (AUTH_DRIVER=rauthy, staff-facing, apps/web-internal wired into the internal app's web service). Independent apps (separate encore.app files, databases, and deployments) are the locked isolation decision.
record.title: Dual-app generator: two independent Encore apps (external + staff, both rauthy OIDC)
